title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾为象征，强调自由和灵活性。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant.
Any OS. Any Platform.
The lobster way. 🦞

title: obra/superpowers

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development
for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond
The agent harness performance optimization system

title: n8n-io/n8n

highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform
native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code

title: Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
content: OpenAI launches the ChatGPT for Small Businesses program, helping entrepreneurs build AI skills, automate work, and grow with ChatGPT Work.
summary: OpenAI 推出面向小企业的 ChatGPT 计划，帮助创业者提升 AI 技能、自动化工作并借助 ChatGPT Work 实现增长。

helping entrepreneurs build AI skills
automate work
grow with ChatGPT Work

title: OpenAI and Hugging Face partner to address security incident during model evaluation
content: OpenAI and Hugging Face share early findings from a security incident during AI model evaluation, highlighting advanced cyber capabilities and lessons for defenders.
summary: OpenAI与Hugging Face合作，分享了AI模型评估期间一起安全事件的初步发现，强调了先进的网络能力及对防御者的教训。
highlights: OpenAI and Hugging Face share early findings from a security incident during AI model evaluation
highlighting advanced cyber capabilities and lessons for defenders

title: The State of Simulation for Physical AI: An Overview
summary: 本文概述了物理AI仿真的现状，探讨了仿真技术在训练和测试物理AI系统（如机器人、自动驾驶）中的关键作用，并分析了当前挑战与未来发展方向。
highlights: 仿真技术是物理AI发展的核心驱动力，能够加速训练并降低现实世界测试风险。
当前仿真面临真实感与计算效率之间的平衡挑战。
NVIDIA在物理AI仿真领域持续投入，推动从虚拟到现实的迁移学习。

title: Grabette: an open system to record robot-manipulation data
summary: Grabette是一个用于记录机器人操作数据的开放系统，旨在简化数据采集流程，支持多种传感器和机器人平台，促进机器人学习研究。
highlights: Grabette是一个开放系统，用于记录机器人操作数据。
该系统支持多种传感器和机器人平台。
旨在简化数据采集流程，促进机器人学习研究。
